name: devdigest
description: AI-powered PR review digest — automated code review with LLM agents

scripts.typecheck: cd server && pnpm typecheck && cd ../client && pnpm typecheck && cd ../reviewer-core && npm run typecheck
scripts.test: cd server && pnpm exec vitest run --exclude '**/*.it.test.ts' && cd ../client && pnpm test && cd ../reviewer-core && npm test
scripts.test:integration: cd server && pnpm exec vitest run .it.test
